---
title: "Getting Started with groots"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with groots}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

`groots` ships with a minimal example so the scaffold passes basic checks
immediately. Replace the example function, tests, and documentation with your
real package API as soon as you start development.

## Installation

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("sims1253/groots")
```

## Example

```{r}
library(groots)
hello()
hello("team")
```

## Next Steps

- Replace `hello()` with domain-specific functions.
- Update `DESCRIPTION`, `README`, and this vignette.
- Add tests for each exported function before release.
